Start Your Setup Today


Start Your Commercial Transport Business with Clarity, Structure, and Confidence

Get your DOT number, authority, and required filings handled for you with a complete (DFY) Done-For-You setup — so you can focus on the road and getting paid.

Does Your Vehicle Require DOT Authority?

If you are operating for-hire with a vehicle or combination weighing 10,001 lbs or more, the answer may be YES. Many new commercial carriers and operators are required to have a DOT Number and federal compliance setup to legally operate across state lines.

We specialize in the Done-For-You SunShield™ Setup for:

  • Box Trucks & Cargo Vans (Perfect for many Non-CDL operations)
  • Hotshot & Car Haulers
  • Sprinter Vans & Expedited Freight
  • Semi-Tractor Trailers (Owner-Operators & Fleets)


Not Every Commercial Vehicle Requires a CDL — But Many Still Require DOT Compliance

Many new operators are surprised to learn that certain commercial vehicles can legally operate without a CDL while still requiring a DOT Number, Operating Authority, and federal compliance setup.

Whether you’re starting with a cargo van or building a full fleet, the SunShield™ Setup helps commercial carriers and operators get their authority, compliance, and operational setup organized the right way from the start.
.

Starting is one step.

Doing it right is what keeps everything moving.

🛡️ Secure Your SunShield™ Setup

    Helpful Information

    Shipping Policy

    Shipping & Delivery Policy: Miss P’s Sweets & Wellness LLC

    Pre-Order Fulfillment

    Miss P’s Sweets & Wellness LLC is a strict pre-order operation with no physical storefront. To ensure every batch is prepared fresh and never sits in a warehouse over a weekend, orders ship exclusively on Mondays and Tuesdays. Orders placed after the weekly cutoff will be queued for the following shipment cycle.

    Local Delivery (Newark Area)

    • Local delivery is available for select zip codes.
    • Free local delivery is provided for all orders with a $30 minimum. * If your location is eligible, this option will appear automatically at checkout once the order minimum is met.

    Shipping Rates & Transit

    • We utilize Ground Shipping for all non-local orders.
    • Shipping fees are calculated at checkout based on weight and destination.
    • Once your order leaves our facility, Miss P’s Sweets & Wellness LLC is not responsible for carrier delays, weather interference, or incorrect addresses provided at checkout.

    Perishable Handling

    Our products are perishable and must be refrigerated immediately upon arrival. Please track your package closely and ensure someone is available to receive it. All sales are final.

    Returns Policy

    Return & Refund Policy


    1. Final Sale Requirement

    Due to the perishable nature of our products and our "prepared-to-order" manufacturing process, all sales are final. Miss P’s Sweets & Wellness LLC does not accept returns, exchanges, or refund requests once an order has been processed.

    2. Freshness & Damage Claims

    We are committed to the highest standards of quality. If your order arrives damaged or fails to meet our quality specifications, you must notify us via email within twenty-four (24) hours of the recorded delivery time.

    • Evidence Required: Clear photographic evidence of the damaged packaging and/or product must be included with your claim.
    • Resolution: Valid claims will be reviewed for a one-time replacement or store credit at the sole discretion of Miss P’s Sweets & Wellness LLC.

    3. Cancellation Policy

    Cancellations for one-time orders must be requested at least forty-eight (48) hours before your scheduled shipment or local delivery window. Requests made after this period will not be honored, as the fresh-preparation process for your specific order will have already commenced.

    4. Subscription Management & Cancellations

    To ensure the seamless preparation of your recurring wellness ritual, all subscription modifications or cancellations must be completed at least forty-eight (48) hours before your next scheduled billing and preparation date.

    • Billing Protection: If a cancellation request is received less than 48 hours before the scheduled cycle, the current order will be processed and charged as planned. The cancellation will then take effect for the following cycle.
    • No Retroactive Refunds: We do not offer refunds for subscription orders that have already entered the fresh-prep phase.

    5. Shipping & Delivery Responsibility

    It is the customer’s responsibility to ensure a recipient is available to receive and properly refrigerate the product upon arrival. Miss P’s Sweets & Wellness LLC is not liable for spoilage due to incorrect shipping addresses, missed deliveries, or packages left unattended in improper temperatures.
